name: Spicy Cellophane Noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the cellophane noodles in hot water (hot tap water is okay) for 20 minutes to soften. Drain and set aside.
2. Combine the first five ingredients to make the sauce. Set aside.
3. Heat the vegetable oil in a non-stick pan over medium-high heat. Add the scallions, ginger, garlic, and chili paste. Stir and fry for about 10 seconds, until fragrant. Add the sauce mixture and the cellophane noodles. Bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer until almost all of the liquid has evaporated. Serve immediately, sprinkled with the minced scallion greens.
